items.title: Is Procter & Gamble Worth Pursuing Ahead Of Its Q1 Earnings?
items.description: Procter & Gamble (PG) could rebound with attractive valuations, high yield, and Q1 earnings ahead. Read here for an investment analysis.

items.title: Earnings live: Cleveland-Cliffs stock soars, Zions Bancorp rises with results from GM, Netflix on deck
items.description: Third quarter earnings season is ramping up, and analysts expect S&P 500 companies grew their profits by 8% during the quarter.

items.title: How major US stock indexes fared Monday, 10/20/2025
items.description: U.S. stocks rallied to the cusp of their records. The S&P 500 climbed 1.1% Monday and pulled within 0.3% of its all-time high set earlier this month. The Dow Jones Industrial Average jumped 515 points, and the Nasdaq composite gained 1.4%.

items.title: Apple Helps Lift Equities Intraday as Markets Await This Week's Corporate Earnings
items.description: US benchmark equity indexes were higher after midday Monday, aided by a rise in Apple (AAPL) shares
